bench.value: High Court of Karnataka at Bengaluru
bench.source_text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF KARNATAKA AT BENGALURU

judge.source_text: THE HON'BLE MR. JUSTICE M. NAGAPRASANNA

order_date.source_text: DATED THIS THE 30TH DAY OF JANUARY, 2026

verdict.source_text: the petition lacking in merit stands rejected

operative_paragraphs.direction: Petition dismissed; Investigation to be concluded expeditiously
operative_paragraphs.source_text: Therefore, finding the petition meritless, as none of the contentions advanced would hold water and finding prima facie ingredients being met of the offence under Section 295A of the IPC or even under the Act, the petition lacking in merit stands rejected. Since the crime is of the year 2021, the Investigating Officer shall now conclude the investigation as expeditiously as possible, without brooking any delay, bearing in mind the observations made in the course of the order. Ordered accordingly.

operative_paragraphs.direction: Interim orders dissolved; I.A.No.2 of 2024 disposed
operative_paragraphs.source_text: Interim order of any kind operating shall stand dissolved. Consequently, I.A.No.2 of 2024 also stand disposed.

compliance_tasks.description: Approval - IO to review observations and prepare investigation completion plan
compliance_tasks.source_text: the Investigating Officer shall now conclude the investigation as expeditiously as possible, without brooking any delay, bearing in mind the observations made in the course of the order.

compliance_tasks.description: Execution - IO to conclude investigation and file final report/charge sheet
compliance_tasks.source_text: the Investigating Officer shall now conclude the investigation as expeditiously as possible, without brooking any delay

compliance_tasks.description: Compliance Affidavit - State to file compliance affidavit confirming investigation completion

appeal_review.limitation_period: 90 days (appeal to Supreme Court under Article 132/133/134)
appeal_review.notes: Petitioner may file SLP before Supreme Court within 90 days from order date
appeal_review.source_text: the petition lacking in merit stands rejected

milestones.label: T+75
milestones.description: Compliance Affidavit due; Appeal Review deadline
